another box in the center of Milan.

it doesn't become garbage when it is done.

Everything that is fertile and grows and develops

what we built that will nourish the planet

will they keep this circle in your own garden after you?
to be conscious that we have limited resources,

that we have to produce in our mind.
We have to find out a new idea of beauty,
ambitions that we can achieve, and we need to achieve.
And architecture is just a way to think
about how we live, how we behave.
There is a famous sentence that we say,
we do not design only products or buildings or spaces,
but we design the behavior of people.
